sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40056" key="e)piliph/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιλῐπής</orth> (B), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">λίπος</etym>) <sense id="n40056.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fatty</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:22:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.22.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
